name: num-parks
description: Number of integration-course classrooms in the programme

name: refugees-per-group
source: BAMF integration course typical class size

name: locals-per-group
description: Instructor per classroom (teachers not peer locals)

name: group-target-size
source: BAMF class size norm (20 students + 1 teacher)

name: indoor-season-start
description: Winter-season onset week (0 = no seasonal regime change)

name: motivation-decay-rate
description: Lower than calisthenics because BAMF funding enforces attendance

name: motivation-boost-per-session
source: SDT competence feedback scaled for longer class
description: Slightly lower than calisthenics (3-hour class more cognitively demanding)

name: dropout-threshold
description: Lower because BAMF funding enforces attendance

name: tie-formation-probability
description: Higher than calisthenics; classroom close contact facilitates ties

name: refugee-initial-tie-probability
description: Probability of same-class tie at t=0

name: local-initial-tie-probability
source: Teachers have no peer ties at t=0
description: Teachers start with no prior ties

name: initial-tie-strength
description: Strength assigned to initial ties at t=0

name: language-gain-rate-per-hour
description: Substantially higher; formal instruction is primary design

name: language-friendship-multiplier
description: Slightly lower; formal instruction reduces peer-translation need

name: prior-exercise-probability
description: Proportion with prior partial language exposure

name: refugee-initial-transport-prob
description: Higher than Istanbul because of Berlin transit density

name: dropout-prob-motivation
description: Per-week dropout prob when below threshold

name: reentry-prob-base
description: Higher than calisthenics; formal re-entry mechanisms
